Ikatiar's Stinger  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 12
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 STA: +10
SV POISON: +30
Effect: Ikatiar's Revenge (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 5.5 Size: TINY
Class: SHD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Ikatiar's Stinger
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 12
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 STA: +10
SV POISON: +30
Effect: Ikatiar's Revenge (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 5.5 Size: TINY
Class: SHD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Liferaiser Zen
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 17:45:26
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Ikatiar the Venom

Temple of Veeshan

Range Weapon
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2002 at 7:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778738676
11 posts
It's also a great Range Weapon replacing Idol of thorned , Gorange Idol, Fetish of the Nimble....its 10str 10sta 30svp.....
▲ Page top
Proc changed
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2002 at 6:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1601252381813
7 posts
It seems they upgraded the proc a bit..


Ikatiar's Revenge
Adding 9 Poison counters
DoT for 120 Hit Points (HP) in 6 ticks


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Instantaneous
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 20 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Poison

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 6 ticks (36 seconds)
Duration Formula: 3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
When someone casts: Soandso's fangs gleam with poison.
Spell cast on you: You have been poisoned.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso has been poisoned.
Spell fades: The poison has run its course.

Still isn't much..

Morchaint
▲ Page top

3 posts

QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2001 at 1:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765402564
3 posts
This item has been upgraded a while back. Its now:

11/20 10str/sta 30svpoi
same proc

It also has a really unique look.
▲ Page top
Proc is 2hp/tick - tested
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 6:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757638857
1 post
FizzN, this dagger does NOT do 50/tick.

I looted one of these last weekend and it does indeed do just 2hp/Tick (Druzzil Ro, character Rohaisa, I'll duel you if you'd like to see firsthand). That's 2 hps every 6 seconds, for an amazing total of 20hp/minute.

Level plays no part, I'm level 60. And it still only does 2 hp/tick. :p

It's the kind of weapon proc you'd expect to find in Blackburrow, not the Temple of Veeshan north wing... Let's hope the /feedback command works.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc is 2hp/tick - tested
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2001 at 2:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361254562
View User Forum
119 posts
3 hp/tick in non-duels. hehe Not a big improvement, granted.
▲ Page top
DD poison
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 7:38 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
All poisons work on level...so this doing 2DD at L1 means simply that that is the basis for working out overall damage...the person that said this took 50 per tick off would be right as at higher levels it will do higher amounts of damage...all rogue poisons work like this...at L1 they do a small amount of damage which increases dependant on level of user...

Simply put i would kill for this weapon but will never ever see it in my hand....ahh well

Trystn Satir
Damned inkie rogue
47th cicle of stabbing backs

Adding 9 Poison counters
Decrease Hit Points (HP) by 2 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Instantaneous
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Poison

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: Unknown
Duration Formula: 3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
When someone casts: Soandso's fangs gleam with poison.
Spell cast on you: You have been poisoned.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso has been poisoned.
Spell fades: The poison has run its course.

RE: .
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2002 at 8:44 AM Rating: Decent
kthomas
50 posts
Ok, everyone sees the 2 hp hit from the proc, but it also adds a 20hp/ tick dot, thats 1 decent dot, unfortunately, it only lasts 6 ticks. But, the short duration could be a good thing too, a longer duration could just take aggro and send to the wielder of this weap, shadow knights happen to have feign, and rogues have evade, but,,, I for one have seen both these skills not work.

▲ Page top
RE: effect sounds like the dirk of the traitor effect
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 3:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751354167
12 posts
I have this dirk and I can confirm it does NOT hurt the weilder poison is a long one ( found out in duel) about 50hp per tick also Dirk of the traitor sucks~! comes off of roderick tordeck in EW used for 9th coldain ring quest it's effect called rodericks gift is in the stuns and spins the weilder much like the enchanter whurl till you hurl line of spells
▲ Page top
Think about this..
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 1:47 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Okay, let's recap this effect for a minute. Both Foggn and the anonymous cleric that berate him are essentially right.. the number of poison counters attached to a spell determine _both_ how hard it hits and how hard it is to remove. One or two casts of Cure Poison may not get rid of it, but it will reduce its duration.

As for who gets hit by this proc, I can say with some degree of certainty that this proc hits the mob you're fighting. How did I come to this? Think - THIS DIRK COMES FROM A DRAGON. not only that, but from a DRAGON IN TOV. the cursed Dirk of the Traitor comes from a low level dorf, and is involved in a quest. the risk vs reward formula would not make any type of sense if Ikatiar's Stinger were cursed.

my 2cp
▲ Page top
theory
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
1 counter weak poison
2 counters lesser poison
3 counters poison
4 counters strong poison
5 counters greater poison
6 counters envenomed breath
7 counters venom of the snake
8 counters deadly poison
9 counters ikatier's revenge ? strongest poison in game?
▲ Page top
effect sounds like the dirk of the traitor effect
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757957583
18 posts
the dirk of the traitor, if i have the name right, has an effect of "soandso's revenge" - the name of the traitorous dorf you kill in order to get the dirk. that one procs true north i think on the user, which makes it a pretty interesting weapon to use hehe...

this one's spdat.eff data is probably wrong. 2dd and 9 poison counters? it probably damages the wielder, and it probably has some other effects that aren't showing up. maybe a dot or something? on the wielder... whatever it is, i'm pretty certain it'd be a lot more vicious than 2dd, and hard to cure with 9 poison counters (yes poison counters work like the cleric poster said, it would take a lot of casting cure to remove this effect).

i love items like this =p cursed weapons are so much more interesting... and i could be totally wrong, but you *did* kill ikatiar the venomed to get this, and dragons tend to be pretty cunning.

charmian d`arxx, conjurer of the cimmerii, erollisi marr server

9 Poison Counters
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 5:17 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
As a cleric, allow me to stop laughing long enough to correct you.

9 poison counters means it would take 9 casts of cure poison to remove the spell. Less, obviously, with a better spell like abolish poison

Thank you, drive through.

A random know-it-all
50's uber cleric.

I do believe those 9 counters is the level of the poison. For example a shaman dot would be about 4, and a better shaman dot would be 5. If I'm right its got some nasty dot power to it

now if this adds 9 poison counters to your buff list thats actully a good thing. Since i think mobs are limited to the 15 buffs that players are if they have more then 6 on something is going away because you jus took up 9 slots of them.

A damn nice item for a Rogue.
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 10:25 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sure 11/21 isn't exactly the single best Rogue sticker out there but it is not garbage either. The 30SvP on a weapon is excellent for some raid situations certainly. The proc is a bit of a mystery still... perhaps it is considered cursed after a fashion. (In which case it would still be a situational range slot item.) The 2dd and add nine poison counters is somewhat gibberish to me but it could just be a way of generating taunt(?)
